ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot interacting with a satellite, starting with arms outstretched, then moving to a position as if holding the satellite, and finally returning to a neutral pose.  The sequence will emphasize the robot's careful handling of the satellite. The robot does not have hands, so the 'holding' will be simulated by positioning arms appropriately.

frames.beat: arms reach out wide, ready to receive
arms carefully cradle the satellite in front
arms return to rest, mission complete
